full_text:
Cao Zhen (Zidan) 曹真 (子丹)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zhen (曹真), styledZidan (子丹), was born in Qiao County, Pei Prefecture (Presently Bozhou city in Anhui Province). Served Wei. Adopted into Cao family. Managed affairs after Cao Pi’s death. Cao Zhen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Zhen lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
